Description: Deployment of frontend and frontend-canary rolled out along with NetworkPolicy update-checkout-from-frontend. Traffic to checkoutservice gets immediately blocked.
Users start complaining about inability to purchase products. Support is notified and escalates to SRE.
SRE ricc@ confirms frontend reachable but sees 500 errors in frontend logs indicating i/o timeout to checkoutservice.
ricc@ identifies root cause: NetworkPolicy restricting checkoutservice ingress.
ricc@ deletes poisonous NetworkPolicy. Checkout starts working for main frontend.
Verification confirms general checkouts are succeeding.
ricc@ identifies secondary root cause in frontend-canary (typo in PRODUCT_CATALOG_SERVICE_ADDR).
